/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Binary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/HttpParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/ServerManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/configuration_file/ConfigBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/configuration_file/Directives.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/parsing_helper/ParsingHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/request/Request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/test_server.cpp.o -o my_app
